subcodes.first_line: Glorified be He Who hath appeared in truth, and hath come from the heaven of utterance with mighty proof, and hath spoken before the faces of the world [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: سبحان الذی ظهر بالحق و اتی من سماء البیان ببرهان عظیم و نطق امام وجوه العالم
subcodes.subjects: @suffering and imprisonment, @prayer for nearness to God, @Manifestation of God speaking in the voice of Divinity, @transience; worthlessness of the physical world, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God
